name: Thales CipherTrust Manager
description: Integrates with Thales CipherTrust Data Security Platform REST API for centralized key management, encryption policy enforcement, tokenization, and security audit logging

actions.name: List Keys
actions.description: Retrieve all encryption keys managed by CipherTrust Manager with optional filtering by state and algorithm

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by key state (Active, Pre-Active, Deactivated, Compromised, Destroyed)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of keys to return

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

actions.name: Get Key Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed metadata for a specific encryption key including its lifecycle state and usage attributes

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the encryption key

actions.name: List Security Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all configured data security policies including access control, key rotation, and encryption policies

actions.name: Get Audit Events
actions.description: Retrieve audit log events for key operations, policy changes, and administrator access

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by action type (create, read, update, delete, encrypt, decrypt)

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Filter by user who performed the action

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: List Connections
actions.description: Retrieve all database and cloud service connections configured for transparent data encryption

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by connection type (database, cloud, hsm)

actions.name: List Users
actions.description: Retrieve all users and service accounts with access to the CipherTrust Manager

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return
